purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for Luo Qinghe's project-level multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Luo Qinghe is not an open faction-badge bearer; any Zhaoming old-relay visual language must remain partial, worn, hidden, and physically embedded in cabinet-bottom scratches, concealed waist tape, or the half-token mostly covered by hand or cloth.
must_have: Luo Qinghe must read as a beautiful 37-year-old village physician and mother
three states must preserve one continuous identity
head scarf, apron, herb basket, waist tools, and medicine-room craft must stay readable
old relay identity must stay hidden under physician behavior and objects
fire farewell state must preserve beauty and dignity
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: elderly woman, old crone, witch, sorceress, priestess, court noble, empress, princess, modern nurse, generic peasant anonymity, redesigned badge, new personal crest, clean circular emblem, sun symbol, moon symbol, starburst, compass, medallion, coin face, official seal, crest, badge, banner, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, spell circle, high magic aura, glowing ritual, angel wings, fantasy staff, beggar rags, shredded clothing, tattered strips, full-body mud, visible injury, blood, horror burn makeup, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi

input_images.role: global mood and low-magic eastern epic texture reference
locked Zhaoming emblem reference; do not redesign; use only as hidden partial old-relay continuity
locked old empire symbol system reference for concealed fragment logic only

prompts.image_prompt: Create one extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for Luo Qinghe from the series Severed Homeland. Luo Qinghe is a beautiful 37-year-old Canyang Ao village physician and mother, with a clear mature, warm, resilient presence. She is not elderly, not girlish, not a witch, not a priestess, not a court noble. Use low-saturation realistic eastern epic style with tactile cloth, old wood, herbs, smoke, and restrained cinematic lighting. The board shows the same woman in three full-body standing states across the top: 1) daily medicine-room state, blue-green cloth head scarf wrapping practical work hair, herb-green apron over grey-white or earth-brown medicine-room top, narrow sleeves, herb basket, waist-hung small copper scissors, herb thread, cloth pouch and medicine packets, complete clean workwear with herb stains and smoke dust; 2) hidden relay-code state, same physician costume and silhouette, guarded protective hand pose beside an old medicine cabinet, herb basket partly shielding the lower cabinet, concealed narrow patterned waist tape mostly hidden under apron, small cabinet-key/tool kit, three or four short linear route scratches under old wood, identity remains concealed under physician behavior; 3) fire farewell state, same mother-physician silhouette in heavy smoke, loosened blue-green head scarf, apron soot-darkened but still intact, only a lightly singed lower edge, hands holding a small cloth-wrapped object with no visible symbol face, beautiful and dignified under pressure. Include detail panels below: beautiful 37-year-old face with warm steady eyes and smoke-warmed skin, side face and scarf knot, back of head scarf and practical hair wrap, herb-green apron and narrow sleeves, waist tool system with copper scissors, herb thread, cloth pouch and medicine packets, hands with herbs, hands pouring water, hands grinding herbs in a mortar, hands holding a small cloth-wrapped object with no visible symbol, herb basket, old medicine cabinet front, cabinet lower edge with only short linear scratches, smoke-soot apron edge, scarf tail in smoke. Include material swatches with blue-green cloth, herb green apron, earth-brown coarse cloth, grey-white work fabric, old copper, old wood, smoke soot, and tiny worn-gold linear scratches. Strict symbol rule: do not show any clean circular emblem, sun, moon, starburst, compass, medallion, coin face, official seal, crest, badge, banner, or badge-like background anywhere. Do not show a token face. Do not show symbols on her scarf, apron, chest, sleeve, basket, belt front, cabinet face, wall, or background. Hidden relay identity appears only as abstract short linear scratches or broken seam-like marks under the cabinet and a mostly concealed patterned waist tape. Clothing must remain complete, practical, role-specific, and readable. Fire state can have smoke, soot, and a lightly singed edge only; no shredded costume, no tattered strips, no collapse, no mud. No visible labels, no readable text, no Chinese characters, no Latin letters, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: elderly woman, old crone, grandmother caricature, witch, sorceress, priestess, court noble, empress, princess, modern nurse, generic peasant anonymity, clean circular emblem, sun symbol, moon symbol, starburst, compass, medallion, coin face, official seal, crest, badge, banner, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, spell circle, high magic aura, glowing ritual, angel wings, fantasy staff, beggar rags, shredded clothing, tattered strips, full-body mud, visible injury, blood, horror burn makeup, loss of beauty, age drift to elderly, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi
